---
layout: page
title: Curriculum Vitae
excerpt: Full academic CV — Santosh D. Bhosale
execute:
  freeze: true
engine: knitr
resources:
  - "cv.pdf"
cv:
  pdf: "cv.pdf"
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; }

  .cv-header {
    max-width: 860px;
    margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem 2rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,26,46,0.09);
  }
  .cv-header .sec-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #8888aa;
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    display: block;
  }
  .cv-header h1 {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: #1a1a2e;
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .cv-header p {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: #4a4a6a;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .cv-actions {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.7rem;
  }
  .cv-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.16s;
  }
  .cv-btn-primary {
    background: #2563eb;
    color: white;
    border: 1.5px solid #2563eb;
  }
  .cv-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; color: white; }
  .cv-btn-outline {
    background: white;
    color: #4a4a6a;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(26,26,46,0.12);
  }
  .cv-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #2563eb; color: #2563eb; }

  /* PDF embed */
  .embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,26,46,0.09);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(26,26,46,0.07);
  }
  .embed-container iframe,
  .embed-container object,
  .embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="cv-header">
  <span class="sec-label">Academic</span>
  <h1>Curriculum Vitae</h1>
  <p>Full academic CV including publications, research experience, education, awards, and grants. For a concise one-page overview, download the Resume PDF.</p>
  <div class="cv-actions">
    <a class="cv-btn cv-btn-primary" href="cv.pdf" target="_blank">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
      Download Full CV
    </a>
    <a class="cv-btn cv-btn-outline" href="Resume.pdf" target="_blank">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
      Resume PDF (1 page)
    </a>
    <a class="cv-btn cv-btn-outline" href="Thesis.pdf" target="_blank">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>
      PhD Thesis
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
